title: Day trip to Pershore (Abbey)

main_route.excerpt: Simon, Eve & Tinder went on a day trip to Pershore. Simon bought a battery for the van. We wandered around Pershore & bought a mirror for dressing up in the play room. The Abbey is beautiful. They allowed us to take Tinder in.
It was a wet day but we enjoyed it.

summary: Simon, Eve, and the dog Tinder made a day trip from Birmingham to Pershore, Worcestershire, visiting the Abbey (which allowed dogs inside), wandering the town, and buying a van battery and a mirror. It was a wet day but enjoyable.
extraction_notes: Single-page entry on B_0189_R. The same diary page contains an earlier, separate entry about a weekend at a hotel with an Euston Agricultural Show visit — that entry is a distinct trip segment, not part of this Pershore day trip. The page's parsed iso date shows '2003' but the trip bundle's date_guess and trip_id both indicate 2012-06-16, which is used here. No overnight stays, no crossings. The diary explicitly names Pershore as the destination.
